requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of the job type label 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' across the entire frontend, including job type badges, filter dropdowns, selection options, and any display text where 'Short-Time' appears as a job category or section label.
acceptanceCriteria: The label 'Short-Time' no longer appears anywhere in the UI.

The label 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' appears in all places where 'Short-Time' previously appeared, including job type badges on LandingPage.tsx, filter dropdowns in JobFilters.tsx, and type selectors in JobPostingForm.tsx.
Job listings previously categorized as 'Short-Time' now display as 'NYSC (Youth Corps)'.
The visual styling and layout of the replaced label matches the style of the other job type labels (e.g., Artisan).

file_operations.description: Update the job type badge display in the hero section to replace 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)', ensuring the label and associated icon reflect the new category name while maintaining consistent styling with other job type badges.

Update the job type select dropdown options to replace 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)', ensuring the value sent to the backend matches the updated JobType enum variant 'nysc' and the display text shows 'NYSC (Youth Corps)'.

Update the job type selector in the job posting form to replace 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' in the dropdown options, ensuring the form sends the correct 'nysc' value to the backend when this type is selected.

Update the job type badge rendering logic to display 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' instead of 'Short-Time' when the job type is 'nysc', maintaining consistent badge styling and color with other job type categories.
Review and update any job type display logic or filtering UI elements in the job board to ensure 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' is consistently displayed instead of 'Short-Time' for the 'nysc' job type.
Update the job type display in the job detail view to show 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' instead of 'Short-Time' when rendering job listing details for 'nysc' type jobs.
Update any job type display or filtering logic in the poster dashboard to show 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' instead of 'Short-Time' for 'nysc' type job listings.
Update any job type display or matched job filtering UI in the seeker dashboard to show 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' instead of 'Short-Time' for 'nysc' type jobs.
Update the job type display in the admin job listings table to show 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' instead of 'Short-Time' for 'nysc' type jobs, ensuring consistency across the admin interface.
